extraction.quote: Revenue of $1.95 billion. GAAP net income of $0.82 per diluted share.

validation.detail: Press release headline reports diluted EPS $0.82, but the 8-K financial schedule (p.11) shows $0.79. Difference attributed to non-GAAP adjustments — needs human decision on which figure to record.

per_metric.reason: GAAP/non-GAAP gap — press release $0.82 vs 8-K schedule $0.79.

confidence.summary: Diluted EPS disagrees across sources by $0.03; press release headline figure conflicts with the 8-K schedule.

factors.name: Inter-document agreement
factors.detail: Routed to review queue — no auto-resolution.

factors.name: Cross-period consistency
factors.signal: Revenue trend stable; net income broadly in line.
factors.detail: Only the EPS line shows divergence.

factors.name: Insider and news
factors.signal: No significant insider activity; spin-off coverage continues.

factors.name: Price-trend alignment
factors.signal: Price slope negative — market discounted the EPS figure.
factors.detail: Drift reflects uncertainty around the GAAP/non-GAAP gap.
